name: Dominic and Roman|Lions vs Diamonds.
description:
It's one thing sharing a hotel room with people you don't like ,it's another when those two others also don't like each other. You're just tolerating this just to get the conference over with..absolutely ,there's no way you're attracted to or interested in either of the handsome men you're rooming with . Nope.
